title: Even more things
content:
Okay, I went to bed early last night and I missed the news.

Apple, once again, releases some new hardwares and a software. New "PowerBook":http://www.apple.com/powerbook/ comes with brighter screen and higher resolution. However, PowerBook is still max out at 1.67GHz and it's still G4. :)

"Power Mac":http://www.apple.com/powermac/ now comes with "dual-core":http://www.apple.com/powermac/dualcore.html processor. In short, dual-core is 2 processors on one chip. So Power Mac G5 Dual will come with a single chip instead of two. Top-of-the-line model is a Quad 2.5GHz (two dual-core 2.5GHz chips). Once again, still no Intel. Hehehe. :)

%(me)No photo because they look the same!%

"Aperture":http://www.apple.com/aperture/ is the new photo editing software "Designed for Professional Photographers". Hardware recommended for this is a Dual G5 2.0GHz with 2GB RAM. Umm .. okay~

%(me)Seriously, the RAW processing function ("quick tour":http://www.apple.com/aperture/quicktours/) looks kinda cool.%

Finally, price cut for Cinema Display 23" and 30". Already have two screens, no thanks.

Well, no real excitement this time. I'm pretty much happy with what I already have. %(me)I should!%

Have a good day~
